suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'courses' and 'fetchSyllabus'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [courses, fetchSyllabus]

suppressedMessages.message: '_hash' is assigned a value but never used.
Custom fonts not added in `pages/_document.js` will only load for a single page. This is discouraged. See: https://nextjs.org/docs/messages/no-page-custom-font

React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'onClose' and 'prevPath'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onClose' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [onClose, pathname, prevPath]
